item.title: 12:58 pm, February 1, 2026
item.description:
First ‘contrast’ pass, what do we reckon? Better? Worse? Legally indistinguishable?

I think one of my problems is that I’ve pushed the skin so bright in the highlight (no regrets).

item.title: 2:23 pm, January 31, 2026
item.description: At some point I’m going to have to actually paint the front of this thing…

item.title: 7:21 pm, January 31, 2026
item.description:
Two painting sessions in a single day, purely to appease @erikcats ‘s relentless whip-cracking! My knees won’t last. My ‘painting knees’*

I have though, quite literally, turned a corner.

*What?

item.title: 10:03 pm, January 31, 2026
item.description:
Ohh, we have a canonical spelling.

Two different wheeps! An exotic triple-a graaa!

item.title: 1:24 pm, January 30, 2026
item.description:
Massive compendium box of 80’s Transformers comics just arrived. Regression to childhood approaching 90%.

Includes the legendary Marvel UK run, natch.

(Pics later when I unbox… you flippin’ nerds)

item.title: 5:33 pm, January 30, 2026
item.description: Hasty post-work floor unboxing. It’s… it’s full of stars 🤩

item.title: 5:46 pm, January 30, 2026
item.description: Ba weep granna weep ninny bong, everybody.

item.title: 6:38 pm, January 30, 2026
item.description: I feel you, Optimus.

item.title: 1:06 pm, January 28, 2026
item.description: A few more tippy-taps at lunch and I think we’ve veered into Accidental Hulk territory.

item.title: 8:23 am, January 27, 2026
item.description:
There’s a faint whine of something being stressed to its limit in the stormy dark.

(Not me…)

(… currently)

item.title: 7:46 pm, January 27, 2026
item.description:
Absurdly small forward steps, but this is now a full-on hobby streak: two consecutive human calendar days of tiny, tentative brush-pokery.

Trying to bring back a little saturation while keeping the contrast by applying yellow and purple glazes.

item.title: 6:50 pm, January 26, 2026
item.description: It is, of course, essential to choose the mini with the greatest number of back lumps when practicing skin.

item.title: 10:06 am, January 22, 2026
item.description: Never a great sign when you can scoop the cardboard box from what was just delivered to you with cupped hands.

item.title: 4:00 pm, January 21, 2026
item.description: We have reached the ‘100% vocal fry’ stage of the meeting.

item.title: 10:54 am, January 16, 2026
item.description: George R. R. Martin created a book series so beloved that his fans actively despise him for it.

item.title: 10:56 am, January 16, 2026
item.description: Imagine being trapped in the hell of not being able to finish writing something you still love, while those who love it most just wish you dead.

item.title: 9:57 am, January 7, 2026
item.description: Just out here aura-farming.

item.title: 1:54 pm, January 6, 2026
item.description:
Okay HobbyPals, let’s see if I can top last year’s record of one (1) completed mini. I’m semi-confident I may be able to match that same pace again in 2026 if the knees hold out.

Not a great start tbf - even with my red-green deficiency I can tell that the yellow-red and black-purple here are nails-on-blackboard clashing. Maybe I can do an oil filter when I see how bad the rest of my colour choices turn out to be?

item.title: 9:15 pm, January 6, 2026
item.description:
… just now learning that the performance was a last-minute booking for a song that she had just finished writing and wasn’t even on her current album at the time.

I think it may be too dense a reference to use in mere human language.

item.title: 9:18 pm, January 6, 2026
item.description: … she had never been on TV before.
